# Emily Lucas

> Executive Producer and Cultural Strategy Consultant. Tokyo-born with Japanese-US-UK background. Independent practice spanning production, strategy and visual research for luxury brands across fashion, beauty, hospitality and editorial. Industry experience across the US, UK, GCC and Japan.

Emily Lucas is an Executive Producer and Cultural Strategy Consultant whose work sits at the intersection of four cultures, shaped by growing up in Tokyo and working across London, Dubai, New York and Japan. She was previously Senior Editorial Producer at Harvey Nichols (2024) and Producer at MR PORTER, Net-a-Porter Group (2019–2024). She is currently an independent EP available for production, consultancy and advisory engagements across New York, Tokyo, Dubai, and London.

## Roles

- Executive Producer
- Cultural Strategist
- Editorial Consultant
- Cultural Strategy Consultant

## Services

- Executive production across stills, video, brand films and editorial shoots
- Regional production and consultancy across GCC, Japan, London and New York
- Advisory across content operations, AI integration and brand-side strategy
- Editorial commissions across writing, visual research and image licensing

## Selected Clients & Brands

- Aman (Saudi Arabia flagship campaign)
- One&Only (Moonlight Basin, Big Sky, Montana)
- Condé Nast / Vogue Arabia (relaunch)
- MR PORTER (Net-a-Porter Group)
- Charlotte Tilbury (Disney 100 Campaign)
- Cipriani (Mr. C Residences Dubai)
- Hamilton Watches (Ventura XXL Campaign)
- Jumeirah (Jumeirah Beach Hotel Al Bahar Villa)
- Nike (Vomero 18 Global Launch)
- Mastercard (Sail Grand Prix x Luís Figo)
- J.Crew (Abraham Moon)
- GUESS (Global Ramadan Campaign)
- Columbia Sportswear (Ramadan Activation: Light Your Path)
- Louis Vuitton, Harvey Nichols, SIRO Hotel, Trippin

## Pages

- [Home](https://emilyelucas.com/): Hero, bio, brand list, selected work strips for Production, Strategy & Editorial, Visual Research.
- [All Work](https://emilyelucas.com/work): Numbered index of every project; each opens a case study popup with task, outcome, assets and tags.
- [Production](https://emilyelucas.com/production): End-to-end executive production case studies (Aman, Vogue Arabia, Nike, One&Only, MR PORTER, J.Crew, Cipriani, Mastercard).
- [Strategy & Editorial](https://emilyelucas.com/cultural-strategy): Cultural work across writing, production and strategy — features for Trippin and MR PORTER, MR PORTER's Championing Subcultures and Social Media Strategy.
- [Visual Research](https://emilyelucas.com/visual-research): Image sourcing, photography curation and rights licensing for editorial features.
- [About](https://emilyelucas.com/about): Bio, selected experience, services.
